_meta.description: Static fallback CVE database - 200 high-severity CVEs covering common enterprise attack surfaces

CVE-2017-0144.description: The SMBv1 server in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets (EternalBlue / MS17-010).

CVE-2021-34527.description: Windows Print Spooler Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (PrintNightmare). Allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges.

CVE-2021-1675.description: Windows Print Spooler Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. Allows a remote attacker to execute code as SYSTEM via print driver installation.

CVE-2021-26855.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability (ProxyLogon). Allows unauthenticated attackers to send HTTP requests as the Exchange server.

CVE-2021-26857.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Insecure Deserialization vulnerability. Allows code execution as SYSTEM on Exchange servers.

CVE-2021-26858.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Post-Authentication Arbitrary File Write vulnerability. Allows arbitrary file write after authentication (ProxyLogon chain).

CVE-2021-27065.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Post-Authentication Arbitrary File Write vulnerability. Part of the ProxyLogon exploit chain.

CVE-2019-0708.description: BlueKeep - Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Windows Remote Desktop Services. Allows unauthenticated remote code execution via RDP.

CVE-2019-1181.description: Remote Desktop Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. Pre-authentication vulnerability similar to BlueKeep.

CVE-2019-1182.description: Remote Desktop Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. Pre-authentication RCE via RDP on Windows 8 and later.

CVE-2021-36942.description: Windows LSA Spoofing Vulnerability (PetitPotam). Allows an unauthenticated attacker to force a domain controller to authenticate to an attacker-controlled server.

CVE-2023-34362.description: MOVEit Transfer SQL injection vulnerability allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to gain access to MOVEit Transfer database content.

CVE-2022-41040.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability (ProxyNotShell). Allows authenticated attackers to chain with CVE-2022-41082.

CVE-2022-41082.description: Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (ProxyNotShell). Allows authenticated remote code execution.

CVE-2022-30190.description: Microsoft Windows Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Follina). Triggered via Office documents using ms-msdt: URI scheme.

CVE-2021-44228.description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI injection vulnerability (Log4Shell). Remote code execution via a specially crafted log message containing JNDI lookup strings.

CVE-2021-1423.description: Microsoft Windows NTLM Relay vulnerability enabling privilege escalation via NTLM authentication coercion.

CVE-2020-0796.description: Windows SMBv3 Client/Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (SMBGhost/CoronaBlue). Allows unauthenticated RCE via malformed compressed SMB3 packets.

CVE-2021-34486.description: Windows Event Log Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability allowing local attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.

CVE-2022-26925.description: Windows LSA Spoofing Vulnerability. Allows an unauthenticated attacker to call a method on the LSARPC interface, coercing authentication.

CVE-2022-21999.description: Windows Print Spooler Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. Allows a local attacker to elevate privileges to SYSTEM.

CVE-2023-23397.description: Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability. Zero-click NTLM hash theft via specially crafted Outlook calendar invitations.

CVE-2024-21338.description: Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability exploited in the wild to disable security tools via a vulnerable appid.sys driver.

CVE-2024-1709.description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Authentication Bypass vulnerability allows unauthenticated access to setup wizard and admin functionality.

CVE-2023-36884.description: Windows HTML Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. Exploitation via Office documents with search-ms: URI handler bypass.

CVE-2023-28252.description: Windows Common Log File System Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability actively exploited in ransomware campaigns.

CVE-2023-21768.description: Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability.

CVE-2022-37969.description: Windows Common Log File System Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability enabling local privilege escalation to SYSTEM.

CVE-2021-40444.description: Microsoft MSHTML Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. Exploited via ActiveX control in Microsoft Office documents.

CVE-2020-1380.description: Scripting Engine Memory Corruption Vulnerability in Internet Explorer allowing remote code execution.

CVE-2023-38408.description: OpenSSH ssh-agent Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. A remote attacker can exploit forwarded ssh-agent sockets to execute arbitrary commands.

CVE-2024-6387.description: regreSSHion - OpenSSH Remote Unauthenticated Code Execution Vulnerability. Race condition in signal handler allows RCE as root on glibc-based Linux systems.

CVE-2023-48795.description: Terrapin Attack - SSH Protocol Prefix Truncation Vulnerability. Allows a MitM attacker to downgrade SSH connection security by truncating the handshake.

CVE-2021-28041.description: OpenSSH ssh-agent double-free vulnerability. Could lead to code execution in the ssh-agent process.

CVE-2020-14145.description: OpenSSH client information disclosure through observable discrepancy in algorithm negotiation, allowing server fingerprinting.

CVE-2023-51384.description: OpenSSH ssh-agent incomplete length check vulnerability allowing destination constraints bypass.

CVE-2023-51385.description: OpenSSH OS command injection vulnerability via shell metacharacters in username or hostname when ProxyCommand is used.

CVE-2019-6111.description: OpenSSH scp client arbitrary file overwrite vulnerability. A malicious server can overwrite arbitrary files on the client.

CVE-2019-6110.description: OpenSSH scp client ANSI escape sequence injection enabling output manipulation and path confusion.

CVE-2018-15919.description: OpenSSH username enumeration vulnerability through timing differences in authentication responses.

CVE-2021-41773.description: Apache HTTP Server path traversal and remote code execution. A flaw in path normalization allows attackers to map URLs outside the document root.

CVE-2021-42013.description: Apache HTTP Server path traversal and remote code execution. Bypasses the fix for CVE-2021-41773 with additional path traversal encoding.

CVE-2022-22720.description: Apache HTTP Server HTTP Request Smuggling vulnerability. Incorrect handling of invalid Transfer-Encoding headers allows request smuggling.

CVE-2022-31813.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy X-Forwarded-For header bypass allowing forwarding of IP addresses stripped by reverse proxy.

CVE-2021-45046.description: Apache Log4j2 incomplete fix for CVE-2021-44228 JNDI injection. Thread context map patterns with non-default configurations allow RCE.

CVE-2021-45105.description: Apache Log4j2 uncontrolled recursion from self-referential lookups causing Denial of Service via StackOverflowError.

CVE-2023-50164.description: Apache Struts file upload logic flaw allowing path traversal and remote code execution by uploading files to arbitrary locations.

CVE-2017-5638.description: Apache Struts Jakarta Multipart parser remote code execution. Used in the Equifax breach. Allows RCE via Content-Type header.

CVE-2023-25690.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy HTTP Request Smuggling vulnerability. HTTP headers can be injected in proxied requests via special characters.

CVE-2024-38472.description: Apache HTTP Server Windows UNC path SSRF vulnerability allowing server-side request forgery via malicious URLs.

CVE-2024-38473.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_rewrite proxy handler substitution encoding issue allowing SSRF via special characters.

CVE-2024-38474.description: Apache HTTP Server substitution encoding issue with backreferences allowing code execution in certain configurations.

CVE-2024-38475.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_rewrite improper escaping of output allowing code execution via specially crafted request.

CVE-2024-38476.description: Apache HTTP Server backend applications can cause mod_proxy to forward local error responses to client.

CVE-2021-23017.description: NGINX DNS resolver off-by-one heap write vulnerability allowing remote code execution via specially crafted DNS response.

CVE-2022-41741.description: NGINX ngx_http_mp4_module heap memory corruption when processing specially crafted mp4 files.

CVE-2022-41742.description: NGINX ngx_http_mp4_module use-after-free vulnerability causing memory disclosure or denial of service.

CVE-2019-9511.description: HTTP/2 Data Dribble attack on NGINX allowing denial of service by sending small windows to force server into many tiny sends.

CVE-2019-9513.description: HTTP/2 Resource Loop attack on NGINX causing excessive CPU usage via RST_STREAM frames triggering rapid creation/deletion of streams.

CVE-2024-4577.description: PHP CGI argument injection vulnerability on Windows allowing remote code execution via specially crafted URL parameters.

CVE-2023-3823.description: PHP libxml2 external entity loading vulnerability leading to information disclosure via XML documents.

CVE-2023-3824.description: PHP phar extension buffer over-read vulnerability during uncompression of phar files allowing code execution.

CVE-2022-31625.description: PHP Postgres connection string parameter injection vulnerability via uninitialized pg_connect() arguments.

CVE-2022-31626.description: PHP mysqlnd password buffer overflow when using pdo_mysql with a server supplying a password longer than expected.

CVE-2021-21705.description: PHP SSRF bypass via ftpwrapper URL validation flaw allowing access to internal services.

CVE-2020-7067.description: PHP urldecode() out-of-bounds read vulnerability causing information disclosure from adjacent memory.

CVE-2019-11043.description: PHP-FPM env_path processing bug leading to heap buffer underflow and remote code execution in specific NGINX configurations.

CVE-2018-7600.description: Drupal remote code execution vulnerability (Drupalgeddon2). Allows unauthenticated RCE via form API in Drupal core.

CVE-2017-7679.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_mime buffer overread vulnerability. A malicious server can cause a heap buffer overread when sending crafted headers.

CVE-2014-3566.description: POODLE - SSL 3.0 CBC padding oracle vulnerability. Allows a MITM attacker to decrypt sensitive information from HTTPS connections using SSLv3.

CVE-2011-3389.description: BEAST - SSL/TLS CBC cipher block chaining attack. Allows MITM attacker to decrypt HTTP cookies via chosen-boundary attack on CBC mode.

CVE-2022-0778.description: OpenSSL BN_mod_sqrt() infinite loop vulnerability causing denial of service via specially crafted certificates.

CVE-2021-3449.description: OpenSSL NULL pointer dereference vulnerability. A server process can crash via a maliciously crafted renegotiation ClientHello message.

CVE-2021-3450.description: OpenSSL CA certificate check bypass allowing trusted certificate chains to bypass verification.

CVE-2020-1971.description: OpenSSL EDIPARTYNAME NULL pointer dereference (GENERAL_NAME_cmp) causing denial of service via specially crafted X.509 certificates.

CVE-2019-1559.description: OpenSSL 0-byte record padding oracle vulnerability. Padding oracle allows decryption of traffic when using CBC TLS 1.2 and earlier.

CVE-2014-0160.description: Heartbleed - OpenSSL TLS heartbeat extension buffer overread. Allows an unauthenticated attacker to read server memory including private keys.

CVE-2022-2274.description: OpenSSL RSA implementation incorrect computation for large moduli on x86_64 with AVX512IFMA instructions, leading to memory corruption.

CVE-2023-0286.description: OpenSSL GENERAL_NAME_cmp type confusion vulnerability allowing denial of service or remote code execution via X.400 addresses in certificates.

CVE-2023-20198.description: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Privilege Escalation. Unauthenticated attacker can create admin user via HTTP/HTTPS web UI on exposed devices.

CVE-2023-20273.description: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Command Injection. Allows authenticated users to inject OS commands with root privileges via web UI.

CVE-2022-20821.description: Cisco IOS XR Open Port Vulnerability. A remote attacker can access Redis instance on a development port resulting in code execution.

CVE-2021-34770.description: Cisco IOS XE CAPWAP Processing Memory Corruption Remote Code Execution Vulnerability.

CVE-2020-3452.description: Cisco ASA and FTD Web Services path traversal vulnerability allowing unauthenticated read of sensitive files.

CVE-2019-12643.description: Cisco IOS XE REST API Authentication Bypass Vulnerability allowing unauthenticated access to the REST API.

CVE-2018-0171.description: Cisco Smart Install remote code execution. Allows unauthenticated RCE via TCP 4786 on devices with Smart Install enabled.

CVE-2017-3881.description: Cisco Cluster Management Protocol remote code execution. Unauthenticated attacker can send malformed CMP-specific Telnet options to execute code.

CVE-2023-20269.description: Cisco ASA and FTD SSL VPN unauthorized access vulnerability allowing brute force of credentials and establishing clientless SSL VPN sessions.

CVE-2024-20362.description: Cisco Small Business RV Series Routers XSS vulnerability via the web-based management interface.

CVE-2021-4034.description: PwnKit - polkit pkexec privilege escalation. Memory corruption in pkexec allows local privilege escalation to root on most Linux systems.
